SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.hydrogen

Class ATRHydrogenPlantBuilder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.hydrogen.HydrogenPlantBuilderBase
neqsim.process.hydrogen.ATRHydrogenPlantBuilder
public class ATRHydrogenPlantBuilder extends HydrogenPlantBuilderBase
Builder for an autothermal-reforming hydrogen plant template.

The template wires a methane, steam, and oxygen feed into a dedicated AutothermalReformer, followed by optional PSA purification. It is a practical starting point for ATR versus SMR route comparisons and blue-hydrogen concept screening.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
